frame_analyses.description: Laparoscopic trainer box with foam board visible, no instruments present yet

Two needle drivers visible in frame, beginning needle manipulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Bilateral instrument entry, needle appears to be loaded

frame_analyses.description: Needle drivers working to grasp and position needle, purple suture visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initial needle grasping phase, appropriate instrument positioning

frame_analyses.description: Needle being positioned for first mark penetration on Penrose drain
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle appears well-loaded, approaching first target mark

frame_analyses.description: Needle drivers manipulating suture through drain material
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Active suturing phase, good instrument coordination visible

frame_analyses.description: Beginning intracorporeal knot formation, suture being wrapped around instruments
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Initiating surgeon's knot formation, appropriate technique visible

frame_analyses.description: Purple suture visible being manipulated for knot completion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Suture being pulled through for first throw completion

frame_analyses.description: Long purple suture tail visible extending from trainer, task appears complete
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion visible with suture tail outside trainer

frame_analyses.description: Final view showing completed suture placement

penalties.description: Task appears incomplete - only first throw completed, missing second and third throws required for task 5
Suture tail extends outside trainer box instead of being cut inside

knot_assessments.notes: Only first throw completed - task requires surgeon's knot (double throw) plus two additional single throws

confidence_rationale: Video quality makes it difficult to assess exact suture placement accuracy relative to marks. Task appears incomplete as only one throw was performed instead of the required three throws for task 5. Suture cutting outside the trainer is clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation measurements from target marks due to video resolution and angle
Whether drain slit is properly closed since task was not completed
Complete knot sequence assessment since only first throw was performed
technique_summary: Incomplete performance showing good initial needle loading and suture placement technique, but task was not completed according to task 5 requirements which mandate three throws total (surgeon's knot plus two single throws) with intracorporeal suture cutting.
strengths: Smooth instrument coordination during initial phases
improvement_suggestions: Complete all three throws as required for task 5
Cut suture ends inside the trainer box, not outside
Practice full task sequence to avoid incomplete attempts
